brand_profile.name: MUJI 無印良品
brand_profile.mission: To provide simple, affordable, and high-quality products that enhance everyday living.
brand_profile.target_audience: Minimalists, eco-conscious consumers, and individuals seeking functional design.

primary_colors.name: White
primary_colors.why: Represents simplicity and purity, aligns with minimalist aesthetic.

primary_colors.name: Black
primary_colors.why: Provides contrast and clarity, emphasizes MUJI's straightforward design.

primary_colors.name: Gray
primary_colors.why: Neutral tone that complements primary colors, maintains understated elegance.

primary_colors.name: Beige
primary_colors.why: Natural and warm, reflects MUJI's focus on sustainability and natural materials.

primary_colors.name: Brown
primary_colors.why: Earthy tone that signifies MUJI's commitment to natural, sustainable materials.

color_system.color_psychology: MUJI's color palette evokes calmness, simplicity, and a connection to nature.
color_system.contrast_style: High contrast between text and background for readability, subtle contrast in product design for harmony.

heading_font.name: Helvetica
heading_font.why: Clean and modern, aligns with MUJI's minimalist aesthetic.

body_font.name: Arial
body_font.why: Simple and legible, supports MUJI's focus on clarity and functionality.

layout_grid.white_space_usage: Generous use of white space to emphasize simplicity and focus on product.

photography_style.product_staging: Minimalist, with focus on product functionality

market_position.differentiation: Minimalist design, sustainable materials, functional products

design_patterns.description: Products are displayed with minimal props and distractions.
design_patterns.extractable_rule: Use neutral backgrounds and minimal props to focus on product features.
design_patterns.why_effective: Keeps attention on the product, enhancing perceived value and functionality.

design_patterns.description: Use of whites, grays, and natural tones.
design_patterns.extractable_rule: Maintain a neutral color palette to emphasize simplicity and elegance.
design_patterns.why_effective: Creates a calming and cohesive brand experience.

design_patterns.description: Ample white space around text and images.
design_patterns.extractable_rule: Incorporate generous white space to enhance readability and focus.
design_patterns.why_effective: Improves user experience by reducing cognitive load.

design_patterns.description: Use of clean, sans-serif fonts for readability.
design_patterns.extractable_rule: Select sans-serif fonts for clarity and modernity.
design_patterns.why_effective: Enhances readability and aligns with minimalist design principles.

design_patterns.description: Emphasizing natural materials in product design.
design_patterns.extractable_rule: Highlight natural materials to communicate sustainability.
design_patterns.why_effective: Appeals to eco-conscious consumers and reinforces brand values.

why_rationale.overall_design_philosophy: MUJI's design philosophy centers around simplicity, functionality, and sustainability, aiming to create products that enhance everyday life without unnecessary embellishments.

key_design_decisions.supporting_research: Minimalism reduces cognitive load and enhances user experience.
key_design_decisions.psychological_effect: Creates a sense of calm and focus.
key_design_decisions.market_value: Differentiates MUJI in a crowded market, appealing to consumers seeking simplicity.

key_design_decisions.supporting_research: Growing consumer demand for eco-friendly products.
key_design_decisions.psychological_effect: Builds trust and loyalty among eco-conscious consumers.
key_design_decisions.market_value: Enhances brand reputation and aligns with global sustainability trends.

key_design_decisions.supporting_research: Neutral colors are timeless and versatile.
key_design_decisions.market_value: Ensures longevity of product design, reducing need for frequent updates.

extracted_parameters.contrast_range: High for text, subtle for product imagery
extracted_parameters.information_hierarchy: Clear and logical, with emphasis on product features
